UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN GAEWILER SENIOR, TRUSTEE OF THE GAEHWILER 2000 TRUST GAEHWILER JR, MARTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MULHAIR, JOSEPH ALL UNKNOWN PERSONS CLAIMING A RIGHT TO POSSESSION DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 351 TURK STREET, #304, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN GAEWILER SENIOR, TRUSTEE OF THE GAEHWILER 2000 TRUST GAEHWILER JR, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT MULHAIR, JOSEPH ALL UNKNOWN PERSONS CLAIMING A RIGHT TO POSSESSION DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
